title: Wrong platform when searching for local images
body:
**Description**

If multistage build is used, buildah sticks to the first stage's platform settings when searching for the next stages' images.

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**
Create `Dockerfile.1`:

```Dockerfile
FROM debian:bullseye-slim
RUN echo test
```

Create `Dockerfile.2`:

```Dockerfile
FROM --platform=linux/amd64 debian:bullseye-slim as stage1
RUN echo test

FROM --platform=$TARGETPLATFORM localhost/test:1
RUN echo test2
```

Run the following commands:

```shell
buildah build --platform=linux/arm/v7 --file=Dockerfile.1 -t "localhost/test:1" .
buildah build --platform=linux/arm/v7 --file=Dockerfile.2 -t "localhost/test:2" .
```

**Describe the results you received:**

The second build command fails to find  `localhost/test:1`:

```
> podman build --platform=linux/arm --file=Dockerfile.1 -t "localhost/test:1" .
STEP 1/2: FROM debian:bullseye-slim
STEP 2/2: RUN echo test
test
COMMIT localhost/test:1
--> 15d3bdb1095
[Warning] one or more build args were not consumed: [TARGETARCH TARGETOS TARGETPLATFORM TARGETVARIANT]
Successfully tagged localhost/test:1
15d3bdb10958ad1e082b66f13fc588a6feadb8542529c630346517d0a55ba449

> buildah build --platform=linux/arm --file=Dockerfile.2 -t "localhost/test:2" .
[2/2] STEP 1/2: FROM localhost/test:1
Trying to pull localhost/test:1...
WARN[0000] Failed, retrying in 2s ... (1/3). Error: initializing source docker://localhost/test:1: pinging container registry localhost: Get "https://localhost/v2/": dial tcp [::1]:443: connect: connection refused 
WARN[0002] Failed, retrying in 2s ... (2/3). Error: initializing source docker://localhost/test:1: pinging container registry localhost: Get "https://localhost/v2/": dial tcp [::1]:443: connect: connection refused 
WARN[0004] Failed, retrying in 2s ... (3/3). Error: initializing source docker://localhost/test:1: pinging container registry localhost: Get "https://localhost/v2/": dial tcp [::1]:443: connect: connection refused 
Error: creating build container: initializing source docker://localhost/test:1: pinging container registry localhost: Get "https://localhost/v2/": dial tcp [::1]:443: connect: connection refused
```

Meanwhile image `localhost/test:1` perfectly exists:

```
> podman image ls localhost/test:1
REPOSITORY      TAG         IMAGE ID      CREATED        SIZE
localhost/test  1           15d3bdb10958  8 minutes ago  60 MB
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  
> podman image inspect localhost/test:1
[
     {
          "Id": "15d3bdb10958ad1e082b66f13fc588a6feadb8542529c630346517d0a55ba449",
          "Digest": "sha256:08c6e2dfe9e5dd75a0ac4778dcaa4ee3ef5ad0694d5c8c936169f4ff79bbf02d",
          "RepoTags": [
               "localhost/test:1"
          ],
          "RepoDigests": [
               "localhost/test@sha256:08c6e2dfe9e5dd75a0ac4778dcaa4ee3ef5ad0694d5c8c936169f4ff79bbf02d"
          ],
          "Parent": "411f449131af3008f272704920a410e99405ab8e8bd2e468ab843a96e1463e17",
          "Comment": "",
          "Created": "2023-04-07T13:44:44.267232851Z",
          "Config": {
               "Env": [
                    "PATH=/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/sbin:/bin"
               ],
               "Cmd": [
                    "bash"
               ],
               "Labels": {
                    "io.buildah.version": "1.29.0"
               }
          },
          "Version": "",
          "Author": "",
          "Architecture": "arm",
          "Os": "linux",
          "Size": 60026680,
          "VirtualSize": 60026680,
          "GraphDriver": {
               "Name": "overlay",
               "Data": {
                    "LowerDir": "/home/james/.local/share/containers/storage/overlay/afba1072c6ab8daf4be98261e25d25b8157daf3d93dab5c744098eb89480318b/diff",
                    "UpperDir": "/home/james/.local/share/containers/storage/overlay/457f46c46af8bac2bfba7e2bf93b6db37fbe99859372808ab8999983987fd480/diff",
                    "WorkDir": "/home/james/.local/share/containers/storage/overlay/457f46c46af8bac2bfba7e2bf93b6db37fbe99859372808ab8999983987fd480/work"
               }
          },
          "RootFS": {
               "Type": "layers",
               "Layers": [
                    "sha256:afba1072c6ab8daf4be98261e25d25b8157daf3d93dab5c744098eb89480318b",
                    "sha256:f7c284dbdefc5051b88a1a5eed798f14e8c284c4dc2f08640c1a7872f8e364af"
               ]
          },
          "Labels": {
               "io.buildah.version": "1.29.0"
          },
          "Annotations": {
               "org.opencontainers.image.base.digest": "sha256:d49561458f791d98116224bd01282e9161b25d586061b87059fae834b235a265",
               "org.opencontainers.image.base.name": "docker.io/library/debian:bullseye-slim"
          },
          "ManifestType": "application/vnd.oci.image.manifest.v1+json",
          "User": "",
          "History": [
               {
                    "created": "2023-03-23T01:16:59.858827703Z",
                    "created_by": "/bin/sh -c #(nop) ADD file:1c83b99ee21091150a1c9ee8ef7c40bec3d6cb0d64b8bc0ef40fb97e6233aa5b in / "
               },
               {
                    "created": "2023-03-23T01:17:00.122014795Z",
                    "created_by": "/bin/sh -c #(nop)  CMD [\"bash\"]",
                    "empty_layer": true
               },
               {
                    "created": "2023-04-07T13:44:44.267782151Z",
                    "created_by": "/bin/sh -c echo test",
                    "comment": "FROM docker.io/library/debian:bullseye-slim"
               }
          ],
          "NamesHistory": [
               "localhost/test:1"
          ]
     }
]

```

**Describe the results you expected:**

The second command should succeed.

**Output of `rpm -q buildah` or `apt list buildah`:**

```
buildah 1.29.1-1
```

**Output of `buildah version`:**

```
Version:         1.29.1
Go Version:      go1.20.1
Image Spec:      1.0.2-dev
Runtime Spec:    1.0.2-dev
CNI Spec:        1.0.0
libcni Version:  v1.1.2
image Version:   5.24.1
Git Commit:      faf0d4fcbaede00f4e615dc5cc2ccc816f240cfe
Built:           Mon Feb 20 15:47:12 2023
OS/Arch:         linux/amd64
BuildPlatform:   linux/amd64
```

**Output of `podman version` if reporting a `podman build` issue:**

```
Client:       Podman Engine
Version:      4.4.4
API Version:  4.4.4
Go Version:   go1.20.2
Git Commit:   c8223435f49a860c8ac4281a85db39232745a7cb-dirty
Built:        Tue Mar 28 21:21:36 2023
OS/Arch:      linux/amd64
```

**Output of `cat /etc/*release`:**

```
NAME="Arch Linux"
PRETTY_NAME="Arch Linux"
ID=arch
BUILD_ID=rolling
ANSI_COLOR="38;2;23;147;209"
HOME_URL="https://archlinux.org/"
DOCUMENTATION_URL="https://wiki.archlinux.org/"
SUPPORT_URL="https://bbs.archlinux.org/"
BUG_REPORT_URL="https://bugs.archlinux.org/"
PRIVACY_POLICY_URL="https://terms.archlinux.org/docs/privacy-policy/"
LOGO=archlinux-logo
```

**Output of `uname -a`:**

```
Linux <hostname> 6.2.9-zen1-1-zen #1 ZEN SMP PREEMPT_DYNAMIC Thu, 30 Mar 2023 14:51:16 +0000 x86_64 GNU/Linux
```

**Output of `cat /etc/containers/storage.conf`:**

```
[storage]
driver = "overlay"
runroot = "/run/containers/storage"
graphroot = "/var/lib/containers/storage"

[storage.options]
additionalimagestores = [
]
pull_options = {enable_partial_images = "false", use_hard_links = "false", ostree_repos=""}

[storage.options.overlay]
mountopt = "nodev"

[storage.options.thinpool]
```

comments.body: Found the answer myself. Add `ARG TARGETPLATFORM` to the TOP of the Dockerfile to make it available later.
